name: process-decomposition-lite
description: Free taste of the Process Decomposition Framework: the Process Decomposer orchestrator plus two phases — Bootstrap (stand up the decomposition workspace) and Process Decomposition (event-storm, classify every step as Human / Skill / Agent / LLM, map decision gates, run the error-compounding analysis). Upgrade to Premium for the full 9-phase workflow with skill/agent definition, human-in-the-middle, orchestration, security & governance, evaluation/runtime, and SOC 2 / HIPAA / GDPR compliance templates.
